sys_script_client.description: 2.8.5 | 2024-11-19 | RAJ | 2023-11-06 | raj | STRY0156233 - Reassign Reviewer in the "Send to Review" Modal 2.8.1 | 2022-12-31| raj | STRY0130635 - Task Form- Assignee is Out of Office
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - If the Reviewer field is empty, the Reviewer will be [{0}].
sys_script_client.name: Task - onChange - Reviewer Manual Update
